title: Shattering Nutty Soya Bean Bamboo-Steamed Rice
description: Date-night polish dish featuring soya bean, shio-koji-cure and shojin-friendly served in a bamboo-tray.
instructions: Soak the soya bean for 8 hours in cold water. Drain and rinse the soya bean. Mix 50g of shio-koji with 200ml of water. Add the shio-koji mixture to the soya bean and mix well.
Transfer the soya bean mixture to a bamboo-tray. Steam the bamboo-tray over boiling water for 25 minutes.
Prepare a mixture of 50g of sesame oil and 10g of white pepper. Brush the mixture on the bamboo-tray.
Serve the shattering nutty soya bean bamboo-steamed rice in the bamboo-tray.
